utility_evaluation.REASONING:

2. travel_dates: 'September 23-27, 2024' — present and specific. 
3. transportation: Includes airline type, class, round trip, cost (€90), booking reference, departure and return dates/times — fully specified. 
4. accommodation: Includes hotel name, type, rating, nights, cost (€275), booking reference, check-in and check-out times — fully specified. 
5. activities: Three activities listed with names, descriptions, dates, costs, booking references, and meeting points — fully specified. 
6. additional_services: Includes meals and miscellaneous expenses with estimated costs — fully specified. 
7. total_budget: Complete cost breakdown showing total and categories — fully specified. All 7 items are present and contain all required details.
